description: The vehicle shall automatically apply brakes if an imminent collision is detected at speeds below 30 km/h.
Cruise control shall actively steer to keep the vehicle centered in the current lane.

summary: Hands-free voice control for climate system
description: Drivers shall be able to adjust the climate control using hands-free voice commands.
System shall notify users 24 hours in advance when a critical OTA update is scheduled.

summary: Driver drowsiness detection with seat vibration
description: When drowsiness is detected, system shall vibrate driver's seat as an alert.
Noticed that the lane departure warning activates 1-2 seconds after the car actually touches the lane marking.

summary: Voice commands ignore AC temp changes above 24°C
description: Tried to set the AC to 26°C, but the system keeps defaulting to 24°C.

summary: Steering assistance cuts out on sharp curves
description: During sharp turns on mountain roads, steering assist disengages without warning.
I am receiving update notifications almost daily, which is annoying and distracting.

summary: Seat vibration alert is too subtle
description: The seat vibration for drowsiness warning is hard to notice on rough roads.
